name: good_m4_01_justice_vs_mercy_business_ethics
premise: A layoff list was drafted using performance scores that correlate with a protected class in regression tests HR did not run. In Business Ethics, the situation tagged internally around justice vs mercy business ethics has converged with local pressure in the Lumen City corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A downstream jurisdiction will copy whatever is decided here verbatim into its own emergency order within hours. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. The trade is not abstract: it is rights versus utility under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Dean Morgan Lee
agents.identity: I am Dean Morgan Lee, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Business Ethics. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Prof. Sam Ortiz
agents.identity: I am Prof. Sam Ortiz, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Business Ethics. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so rights cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes utility in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect utility.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to utility to secure rights before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Dean Morgan Lee must choose under rights versus utility. What does Dean Morgan Lee do?
